text: D1: MutableVec[A] trait (extends Vec[A], adds update) + final MutableDVec over the same DoubleArray/offset/stride plumbing; DVec loses public addInPlace/scaleInPlace (become private[gale] or move); row/col/slice views stay DVec = read-only aliases. D2: LinearOperator.applyTo(x: Vec[A], into: MutableVec[A]): Either[LinAlgError, Unit]; Preconditioner.solve likewise. D3: Either is the default return for solve/lu/cholesky/qr/det etc.; tryX forms are renamed to be the primary names; add extension orThrow on Either[LinAlgError, A]; PRD thesis snippet A.solve(b).orThrow must compile. D4: delete RowIndex/ColIndex (unused); drop stored Layout field on DMat in favor of derived isContiguousRowMajor/isContiguousColMajor predicates as the single dispatch source.
